channel.title: Travel on ExampleSite
channel.description: Recent content in Travel on ExampleSite

item.title: Montreal
item.description:
• Came to Cafe Neve near Mount Royal station. I’m thinking I like Montréal bagels a bit more bc they seem lighter in bread content.

![[B83A4604-8600-42DE-8836-439A20F24113.jpeg]]

  • Made it to the top of Mount Royal Park after 5 miles. ![[7D21B780-9F86-4BAA-B75D-DB0FA8188251.jpeg]]![[B3AA9AF7-A013-4496-A9FF-E4BE823BFFAF.jpeg]]

item.title: Montreal Final Day
item.description:
Final day in Montreal. Rachael was able to find the old post office I was after for my NFT project (Gramajo’s Delivery Service). We even randomly found a old school Royal Mail box at Crew Collective which was a place we went to on the first day which was nice.

![[7849EB1D-A632-475F-A41C-3639E9CA662C.jpeg]] From there we went to the Norte Dame Basilica. Which we toured for a bit and most just sat down since we walked a lot this trip.
